'''Riva''' was the owner of a guest house in [[Telos IV]], where [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] hid in.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' {{1stm}}
